title: Lecture Two Hall-Response Symbols
summary: This notation map fixes the symbols used in Lecture Two for the Chern-Simons level, Hall current, filled-band Chern number, and twist-angle Berry curvature.
assumptions: The low-energy response is described by a 2+1-dimensional effective action.
The finite sample has periodic boundary conditions with twist angles alpha_1 and alpha_2.
regime: Lecture Two integer quantum Hall response and Berry-curvature notation.
scope: Shared notation for the Hall-response / Chern-number equivalence branch.

source_anchors.notes: Hall-response notation centered on the integer level k.
Twist-angle Berry-curvature notation for the many-body Chern number.

representation: Shared symbol table for the Hall-response / TKNN / twist-angle branch.

symbols.meaning: integer Chern-Simons level or Hall-response coefficient
filled-band first Chern number in single-particle band theory
many-body Chern number over the twist-angle torus
twist angles or flat background holonomies around the two spatial cycles
Berry curvature on the twist-angle torus

retrieval_hints: Use before answering a Lecture Two derivation question that mixes k, k', and the many-body twist-angle invariant.
